items.question: How do I write good prompts for groan sound?
items.answer: Write clear, specific descriptions. Mention intensity (soft, medium, loud), context (pain, effort, reaction), and any style (realistic, stylized). Our groan sound generator responds well to detail—e.g. "short groan after impact" or "layered moaning sound effect meme style in distance." Include mood and length when relevant. The more context you give, the better the result. Try different phrasings to explore variations that match your scene or moaning sound effect meme.
